headline: Boeing (BA) Is Up 7.1% After Artemis SLS Success And PAC-3 Deal Pivot - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Recently, NASA’s Space Launch System rocket, featuring a Boeing-built 212-foot core stage produced at Michoud, successfully launched the Artemis crewed lunar flyby mission and completed all key in-flight operations from fueling through stage separation. This success, alongside Boeing’s work on core stages for Artemis III to V and its widespread U.S. supplier base, reinforces the company’s role in deep-space infrastructure even as NASA evaluates more cost-effective approaches for later moon...

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider BAE Systems (LSE:BA.) After Its Strong Multi Year Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether BAE Systems at £22.89 is still offering value after a strong run, this article walks through what the current price might be implying about the company. The stock has posted returns of 9.4% over the past week, 3.1% over the last month, 30.5% year to date and 44.0% over the past year, with a very large gain over five years that points to a major re rating over time. Recent market attention on defence and security spending has kept BAE Systems in focus, as...
